results.title: Only 24 percent say Iran war was worth the cost: Survey
results.description: Less than a quarter of Americans ​believe President Trump's war with Iran was worth its costs, according to a new poll by Reuters/Ipsos out Tuesday.

results.title: Mark Meadows to Newsmax: Trump Connects With Working-Class Voters
results.description: Former White House chief of staff Mark Meadows told Newsmax on Tuesday that President Donald Trump connects with working-class Americans in a way no other politician can, saying voters believe Trump cares enough to listen.
